creator: daniel@netwalk.org
text:
This patch is now obsolete. I just submitted a patch for the 0.4.0
release.

It's still taking a long time for my patches to be upgraded. My port is
now 4 or 5 releases behind the actual software I'm porting and I'm
starting to feel that with several of my ports having been obsoleted
before it ever sees the light of day, there's actually no point in
continuing to submit ports. Last port submission took 4 months.

I've offered to help in any way possible to make this process
easier/smoother/faster, but so far I've not been asked to help, and
frankly, I'm getting frustrated.

Please CLOSE ports/123616 as obsolete.

-d


-- 
"All free constitutions are formed with two views -- to deter the governed from
crime, and the governors from tyranny."
-- John Lansing, Jr.  (1754-1829)
    Source: Debate, Constitutional Convention, 1787
